transcript: Yeah, lemme tell you somethin', mister. [exhale] Let me tell you a thing or two, mister. [exhale]
I'm gonna come out there, I'm gonna rent me a room, and you're gonna be renting a clinic for the night when I'm done poundin' on ya. [exhale]
I don't know who the fuck you're even talkin' to, old buddy.
You're gonna be talkin' to my foot, after I... fix it in your cheek. How does that sound?
I'll tell you what, motherfucker. You better know what the fuck you're talkin' about.
Uh... my fists know what they're saying, and they're going to be saying it rather loudly to your face, how's that sound? Huh?
'[delayed sample]' Your choice, slug or buckshot?
Well, talk to me a little bit more.
Cocksucker, if... if you're not who I'm thinkin' I'm talkin to, you better know what the fuck you're talkin' to!
You're gonna be talkin' to the ground, after you're layin' on it.

I'll tell you what, prick. Why don't you just tell me where to meet you, and I tell you what, I will be fucking there. 'Cause I don't want to hear your fucking shit, I don't want to tell you shit, motherfucker, you...
'[delayed sample]' Bring a gun with you. Make sure it's loaded, make sure you know how to use it.
Yeah, you'll be there, but your lips ain't leavin', 'cause they're gonna be on the ground.
You talk real tough over the phone, kid.
Yeah, I'm gonna bust your teeth--
'[delayed sample, looped]' DO IT NOW! BRING A FUCKING GUN! BRING A FUCKING GUN!
Tell you what, motherfucker. You ain't tough enough to bust my fuckin' teeth.
I'm way too tough, as a matter of fact.
Naw, naw, you're a fuckin'... you're a punk kid.
Yeah, you're gonna meet up with my... my goat, he's a kid, I'm gonna--
I'm in room 11, just fuckin' look me up.
And I tell you what, I'll show you something that you've never seen before in your fuckin' life...
I don't give a fuck if you've got a whip, I don't give a fuck if you've got a chain, I don't give a fuck if you've got a shotgun. Don't fucking start--
'[delayed sample]' YOU DON'T KNOW WHO YOU'RE FUCKING WITH!
Yeah, you're gonna meet up with my horse whip.
Yeah, you're a fuckin' cunt. All you got to do is jack off and fuck someone in the fuckin' eye.
'[delayed sample]' You started it, now BACK IT UP! BACK IT UP, ASSHOLE!
[unintelligible] You come here, you fuckin' tell me about it.
Hey, enough of this telephone shit. We're coming right by there right now, fucker.
Well, come by. I'll tell you what, motherfucker, you better be... you better be packing a fuckin' gun, 'cause it's the only way you're fuckin'...
I'm gonna... come over with a brick, take it to your face. [exhale] How's that sound?
'[delayed sample]' DO IT RIGHT NOW! That's exactly what you're gonna have to do!
I'm not actin' pretty tough, I am tough.
Gonna be tougher for you to get away from my foot--
Who in the fuck are you?
I'm a little man, but I got big fists. How's that sound?
Mmm, I'll tell you what, motherfucker. You... you're not even close to where I'm fuckin' at. You... you're a fuckin' has been that never... never ain't fuckin'... hit this fuckin' world.
'[delayed sample]' Come on, come on, come on. Nuh-uh. You'll be eating twelve gauge lead.
I got a fuckin' chain I'm gonna take to... take to your lip.
I don't give a fuck if you've got a fuckin' shotgun, motherfucker. You're talkin' to the wrong fuckin' guy, here.
You're callin', hasslin' somebody, you're fuckin' with the wrong guy. And I'll tell you what, if you pull in this fuckin' parking lot, you better fuckin' go back out.
'[delayed sample]' Listen up, you son of a bitch!
[unintelligible] --over here, we'll see what happens, okay?
Uh, you- you're gonna be seein' stars, after I'm done with you.
[laughs] I hope the fuck you know who you're talkin' to.
'[delayed sample]' Oh, if I could get you... if I could get you...
Drag your lip on the pavement.
'[delayed sample]' If you ain't gonna show, don't even blow.
Hey, I'm not jokin' with your fuckin' tape recorder, motherfucker.
